mapper.select: select category_id, ent_code, out_put_id, waste_dict_id, waste_name, disposal_method, waste_form, design_output, package_type, main_component, hazardous_component, hazard_characteristic, precautions, emergency_measures, disposal_unit from t_waste_category where category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_waste_category
category_id, ent_code, out_put_id, waste_dict_id, waste_name, disposal_method, waste_form, design_output, package_type, main_component, hazardous_component, hazard_characteristic, precautions, emergency_measures, disposal_unit,
#{categoryId}, #{entCode}, #{outPutId}, #{wasteDictId}, #{wasteName}, #{disposalMethod}, #{wasteForm}, #{designOutput}, #{packageType}, #{mainComponent}, #{hazardousComponent}, #{hazardCharacteristic}, #{precautions}, #{emergencyMeasures}, #{disposalUnit},
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_waste_generate WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_waste_reduction WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_waste_storage WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_waste_outbound WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}), 0) AS total_occurrence
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_waste_total_plan p INNER JOIN t_waste_category c ON p.waste_dict_id = c.waste_dict_id WHERE c.category_id = #{categoryId}
